qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.oi_tipo_costo oi_tipo_costo, SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.c_tipo_costo c_tipo_costo, SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.d_tipo_costo d_tipo_costo FROM SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO ORDER BY SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.oi_tipo_costo ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Tipos_Costos.TIPO_COSTO\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('SELECT SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.oi_tipo_costo oi_tipo_costo FROM SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO ORDER BY SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.oi_tipo_costo ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in table('select policy from NMD_SECURITY where class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Tipos_Costos.TIPO_COSTO\' and id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Tipos_Costos.TIPO_COSTO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Gestion_de_Postulantes.Tipos_Costos.TIPO_COSTO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.oi_tipo_costo) as CNT from SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.oi_tipo_costo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.d_tipo_costo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEL04_TIPOS_COSTO.c_tipo_costo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
